'''鈭歯g-k-dh''' ('''ngakadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quieten|quieten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quieten|quieten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-k-dh
|-
! Lemma
| ngakadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngakadhithi|ngakadhithi]] || [[word:ngakadhiji|ngakadhiji]] || [[word:ngakadhishi|ngakadhishi]] || [[word:ngakadhi|ngakadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakadhuthuth|ngakadhuthuth]] || [[word:ngakadhujuj|ngakadhujuj]] || [[word:ngakadhushush|ngakadhushush]] || [[word:ngakadh|ngakadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakadhuthu|ngakadhuthu]] || [[word:ngakadhuju|ngakadhuju]] || [[word:ngakadhushu|ngakadhushu]] || [[word:ngakadhu|ngakadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakadhufuth|ngakadhufuth]] || [[word:ngakadhufuj|ngakadhufuj]] || [[word:ngakadhufush|ngakadhufush]] || [[word:ngakadhuf|ngakadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngakadhethe|ngakadhethe]] || [[word:ngakadheje|ngakadheje]] || [[word:ngakadheshe|ngakadheshe]] || [[word:ngakadhe|ngakadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakadhothoth|ngakadhothoth]] || [[word:ngakadhojoj|ngakadhojoj]] || [[word:ngakadhoshosh|ngakadhoshosh]] || [[word:ngakadh|ngakadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakadhotho|ngakadhotho]] || [[word:ngakadhojo|ngakadhojo]] || [[word:ngakadhosho|ngakadhosho]] || [[word:ngakadho|ngakadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakadhofoth|ngakadhofoth]] || [[word:ngakadhofoj|ngakadhofoj]] || [[word:ngakadhofosh|ngakadhofosh]] || [[word:ngakadhof|ngakadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngakadh忙th忙|ngakadh忙th忙]] || [[word:ngakadh忙j忙|ngakadh忙j忙]] || [[word:ngakadh忙sh忙|ngakadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngakadh忙|ngakadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakadhathath|ngakadhathath]] || [[word:ngakadhajaj|ngakadhajaj]] || [[word:ngakadhashash|ngakadhashash]] || [[word:ngakadh|ngakadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakadhatha|ngakadhatha]] || [[word:ngakadhaja|ngakadhaja]] || [[word:ngakadhasha|ngakadhasha]] || [[word:ngakadha|ngakadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakadhafath|ngakadhafath]] || [[word:ngakadhafaj|ngakadhafaj]] || [[word:ngakadhafash|ngakadhafash]] || [[word:ngakadhaf|ngakadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngakadhasha|ngakadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongakadhasha|gongakadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingakadhasha|gokingakadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngakadhn眉sha|ngakadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongakadhnkn眉sha|gongakadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingakadhn眉sha|gokingakadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngakadhsh毛sha|ngakadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongakadhnksh毛sha|gongakadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingakadhsh毛sha|gokingakadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakadhrosha|ngakadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakadhnkrosha|gongakadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakadhrosha|gokingakadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakadhmusha|ngakadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakadhnkmusha|gongakadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakadhmusha|gokingakadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngakadhsherasha|ngakadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongakadhnksherasha|gongakadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingakadhsherasha|gokingakadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngakadhngasha|ngakadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongakadhnkngasha|gongakadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingakadhngasha|gokingakadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngakadhyasha|ngakadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongakadhnkyasha|gongakadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingakadhyasha|gokingakadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngakadhyamasha|ngakadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongakadhnkyamasha|gongakadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingakadhyamasha|gokingakadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngakadhn眉sh毛sha|ngakadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongakadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gongakadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingakadhn眉sh毛sha|gokingakadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakadhn眉rosha|ngakadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakadhnkn眉rosha|gongakadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakadhn眉rosha|gokingakadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakadhn眉musha|ngakadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakadhnkn眉musha|gongakadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakadhn眉musha|gokingakadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngakadhsh毛n眉sha|ngakadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongakadhnksh毛n眉sha|gongakadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingakadhsh毛n眉sha|gokingakadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakadhsh毛rosha|ngakadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakadhnksh毛rosha|gongakadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakadhsh毛rosha|gokingakadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakadhsh毛musha|ngakadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakadhnksh毛musha|gongakadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakadhsh毛musha|gokingakadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngakadhron眉sha|ngakadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongakadhnkron眉sha|gongakadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingakadhron眉sha|gokingakadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngakadhrosh毛sha|ngakadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongakadhnkrosh毛sha|gongakadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingakadhrosh毛sha|gokingakadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakadhromusha|ngakadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakadhnkromusha|gongakadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakadhromusha|gokingakadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngakadhmun眉sha|ngakadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongakadhnkmun眉sha|gongakadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingakadhmun眉sha|gokingakadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngakadhmush毛sha|ngakadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongakadhnkmush毛sha|gongakadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingakadhmush毛sha|gokingakadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakadhmurosha|ngakadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakadhnkmurosha|gongakadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakadhmurosha|gokingakadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngakadh|ngakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙k忙dh|ng忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongakadh|hongakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙k忙dh|hong忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongakadh|hohongakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙k忙dh|hohong忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngakadh|n眉ngakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙k忙dh|n眉ng忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngakadh|n眉n眉ngakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙k忙dh|n眉n眉ng忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngakadh|n茂ngakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙k忙dh|n茂ng忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngakadh|n茂n茂ngakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙k忙dh|n茂n茂ng忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungakadh|lungakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙k忙dh|lung忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungakadh|lulungakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙k忙dh|lulung忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingakadh|lingakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙k忙dh|ling忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingakadh|lilingakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙k忙dh|liling忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongakadh|kongakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙k忙dh|kong忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongakadh|kokongakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙k忙dh|kokong忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengakadh|kengakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙k忙dh|keng忙k忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengakadh|kekengakadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙k忙dh|kekeng忙k忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
